mapper.select: SELECT s.sku_id AS skuId, s.spu_id AS spuId, s.price, s.stock, s.bar_code AS barCode, s.sku_spec AS skuSpec, s.status, s.version, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM goods_sku s WHERE s.sku_id = #{skuId}
SELECT s.sku_id AS skuId, s.price AS fen, s.stock, s.sku_spec AS skuSpec FROM goods_sku s WHERE s.spu_id = #{spuId} and s.status=1 ORDER BY s.sort DESC

SELECT s.sku_id AS skuId, s.price AS fen, s.stock, s.bar_code AS barCode, s.sort AS sort, s.sku_spec AS skuSpec, s.status AS status, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM goods_sku s WHERE s.spu_id = #{spuId} ORDER BY s.sort DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO goods_sku ( spu_id, price, stock, bar_code, sort, sku_spec, status, version, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{spuId}, #{sku.fen}, #{sku.stock}, #{sku.barCode}, #{sku.sort}, #{sku.skuSpec}, #{sku.status}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
